title: phanera splendens
intro: Phanera splendens, also known as the climbing bamboo orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the family Cane family (Bambusoideae). This plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which may help in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Phanera splendens include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating respiratory issues such as cough and bronchitis. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, decoctions, and infusions for its medicinal uses.
